name: Oven-Baked Buttermilk Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup buttermilk (1 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice mixed with enough milk to equal 1/2 cup; let stand for 5 minutes)
3 lbs chicken cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Combine the golden onion soup mix with flour and set aside.
3. Beat eggs with buttermilk in a bowl.
4. Dip each chicken piece in the buttermilk mixture, then coat well with the flour mixture.
5. Place the coated chicken pieces in a large shallow baking pan on a rack.
6. Chill for 30 minutes.
7. Drizzle the chicken with melted margarine or butter.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until thoroughly cooked.
NOTE:
This is a great recipe for picnics or just eating outdoors.
